recommendations.rationale: Data-driven: 3297 HTF bars across 4 symbols. Primary engine p90/p92/p95 medians: 52/55/62. Current pass rates at 85: [BOOM300(sell)@85=0%, CRASH300(buy)@85=0%, R_75(buy)@85=0%, R_75(sell)@85=0%, R_100(buy)@85=0%, R_100(sell)@85=0%]. Recommended thresholds derived from actual score distributions without enforcing minimum floors. If these are below the mandatory minimums (85/90/92), the engines need component recalibration — not threshold lowering.
